retry_reason: refcount_inc is unconditional and always succeeds; no failure path exists.
contract_summary: Acquire wrapper: increments the refcount of an afs_vlserver object, returning the same pointer. The caller must later release the reference via a corresponding afs_put_vlserver call. This represents the 'get' stage of the object lifecycle, ensuring the object remains valid while in use.
